bonuses.leadin: Note to moderator: do not read the alternate answers to the first part. Opportunistic infection with Pneumocystis cryptosporidium is common in “hyper-[this protein] syndrome,”caused by mutated CD40L leading to a defect in class switching. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this very large protein consisting of two heavy and two light chains, which forms intermolecular disulfide bonds, aggregating into pentamers. It is produced in the immediate response to an antigen.
IgM is the largest isotype of these Y-shaped proteins produced by B cells, which specifically recognize and bind to antigens.

IgM turning up in an ELISA for this disease, which is part of the TORCH complex, indicates recent infection. Patent ductus arteriosus and “blueberry muffin” skin lesions appear in babies with the congenital form of this disease, which you don’t have because you were given the MMR vaccine. . . right?
answers: rubella [or German measles; or three-day measles; for the love of God, do NOT accept or prompt on “measles”]
answers_sanitized: IgM [or Immunoglobulin M; prompt on "immunoglobulin" or "antibody"]
rubella [or German measles; or three-day measles; for the love of God, do NOT accept or prompt on "measles"]

IgM is the largest isotype of these Y-shaped proteins produced by B cells, which specifically recognize and bind to antigens.

IgM turning up in an ELISA for this disease, which is part of the TORCH complex, indicates recent infection. Patent ductus arteriosus and "blueberry muffin" skin lesions appear in babies with the congenital form of this disease, which you don't have because you were given the MMR vaccine. . . right?

bonuses.leadin: s 21. His works include The Defeat of the Floating Batteries at Gibraltar and The Red Cross Knight. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this artist who kind of botched it by putting in big lips in his Watson and the Shark.

Most of us can get behind the fact that Watson and the Shark is art, with or without lips, but it sure does take a lot more to get to the position to accept that this man’s The Physical Impossibility of Death in the Mind of Someone Living is also art as well.
Damien Hirst’s best work of art is probably this sculpture, which consists of 8,601 diamonds embedded into a skull of platinum.
